params.dAppRecipient: Where to send the dApp's share (PerpEngine)
params.totalFee: Total fee amount in G$ from trading operation

getDerivativesSocialImpactRate().notice: Calculate derivatives social impact rate.         Returns UBI generated per G$ of trading volume.

getMonthlyUBIEstimate().notice: Calculate estimated monthly UBI contribution from derivatives trading.         Target: $10K+ monthly from perpetual futures.

getPerpsUBIStats().notice: Get perpetual futures specific UBI statistics.

getTodayDerivativesImpact().notice: Get current day's UBI impact for real-time monitoring.

goodDollar().notice: Required by PerpEngine to get GoodDollar token address.

setGoodDollar(address).notice: Update the GoodDollar token address when redeployed

splitFee(uint256,address).notice: Split trading fees from PerpEngine.         Called for position open/close fees automatically.

splitFundingFee(uint256,address,uint256).notice: Split funding rate fees.         Called when funding payments generate protocol revenue.

splitLiquidationFee(uint256,address,addr.notice: Split liquidation fees/bonuses with UBI routing.         Called by PerpEngine when positions are liquidated.

splitTradingFee(uint256,address,address,.notice: Split trading fees with additional tracking.         Called by PerpEngine for detailed position tracking.
